details.test: Task 1: Save climate/environment issue and copy share link
Task 2: Save two most recent education posts after 2024-01-01
Task 3: RSVP to earliest evening town hall on/after 2025-07-15
Task 5: Volunteer signup for door knocking and phone banking, weekends, 4 hrs/week
Task 6: Compare candidates on an issue and send healthcare policy question
Task 7: Complete voter survey with Climate, Healthcare, Education, age 25-34, very likely, Independent
Task 8: Set weekly email updates for Environment and Education only
Task 9: Watch most-viewed 2023 speech and post inspired comment
